Package com.rays.common

Class BaseServiceImpl<T extends BaseDTO,D extends BaseDAOInt<T>>

java.lang.Object
com.rays.common.BaseServiceImpl<T,D>
Type Parameters:
T - DTO type extending BaseDTO
D - DAO type extending BaseDAOInt
All Implemented Interfaces:
BaseServiceInt<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
AttachmentServiceImpl, CollegeServiceImpl, CourseServiceImpl, FacultyServiceImpl, MarksheetServiceImpl, RoleServiceImpl, StudentServiceImpl, SubjectServiceImpl, TimeTableServiceImpl, UserServiceImpl
public class BaseServiceImpl<T extends BaseDTO,D extends BaseDAOInt<T>> extends Object implements BaseServiceInt<T>
Generic service implementation providing common business logic for all entities using BaseDAO. Handles CRUD operations, transaction management, and basic validation.
Author:
Saket

    • add

      @Transactional(readOnly=false) public long add(T dto, UserContext userContext) throws DuplicateRecordException

      Throws:

    • update

      @Transactional(propagation=REQUIRED) public void update(T dto, UserContext userContext) throws DuplicateRecordException
      Updates an existing record while preserving creation metadata.
      Specified by:
      update in interface BaseServiceInt<T extends BaseDTO>
      Throws:
